title: Godzilla VS Kong VS Evangelion Scene Parallels Spoilers
display_title: Godzilla VS Kong VS Evangelion Scene Parallels Spoilers
wikitext:
[]: Godzilla VS Kong VS Evangelion: Scene Parallels (Spoilers)             Quote Post by sithsauron » Fri Apr 09, 2021 1:49 pm So there are 2 scenes in Godzilla vs Kong as well as Kong: Skull Island that have setting parallels and even a few action scene parallels 1. Kong: Skull Island, the first fight scene of Kong taking out the helicopter squad. It almost feels like a straight rip of EOE Eva-02 taking out JSSDF Helicopters before the third impact. I even think they stole some of Eva-02's moves in the choreography. 2. Godzilla vs Kong, fight scene at sea on the air craft carriers. Obviously same setting as EVA TV's fight with Gaghiel vs Eva-02. I don't think this ripped off any choreography or action sequences. Even the choice of setting may be coincidental, or it may have been inspired from. Does anybody see any other parallels between the Cinematic Monsterverse movies and Evangelion Scenes. Any questions? comments? opinions? Which Evangelion character's soul got reincarnated into Kong and which into Godzilla? For Godzilla, its gotta be Gendo.

[]: Re: Godzilla VS Kong VS Evangelion: Scene Parallels (Spoilers)             Quote Post by EvaChero » Mon Apr 12, 2021 9:48 am Haven't seen Skull Island but the surface ship battle in GvsK put EVA02's battle immediately into mind. I was sure it was a homage......

Article: Godzilla VS Kong VS Evangelion Scene Parallels Spoilers
[]: Godzilla VS Kong VS Evangelion: Scene Parallels (Spoilers)             Quote Post by sithsauron » Fri Apr 09, 2021 1:49 pm So there are 2 scenes in Godzilla vs Kong as well as Kong: Skull Island that have setting parallels and even a few action scene parallels 1. Kong: Skull Island, the first fight scene of Kong taking out the helicopter squad. It almost feels like a straight rip of EOE Eva-02 taking out JSSDF Helicopters before the third impact. I even think they stole some of Eva-02's moves in the choreography. 2. Godzilla vs Kong, fight scene at sea on the air craft carriers. Obviously same setting as EVA TV's fight with Gaghiel vs Eva-02. I don't think this ripped off any choreography or action sequences. Even the choice of setting may be coincidental, or it may have been inspired from. Does anybody see any other parallels between the Cinematic Monsterverse movies and Evangelion Scenes. Any questions? comments? opinions? Which Evangelion character's soul got reincarnated into Kong and which into Godzilla? For Godzilla, its gotta be Gendo.
